subject: a bearded humanoid figure with short light hair wielding a large ornate glaive-like weapon in a blue-lit cave environment
description: A humanoid figure with a short beard and light-colored hair lunges or advances in a low stance. The figure holds a large staff-like weapon with an oversized ornate blade or head — visibly an unusual, heavy weapon rather than a standard blade. The figure wears a mix of dark cloth and light armor with a visible satchel or pouch on the side. The environment is a cave or tunnel with blue-tinted walls and a crystalline or geometric structure visible behind. The expression reads as focused intensity.
foreground: bearded humanoid figure wielding a large ornate staff-weapon, dark cloth and light armor
background: blue-lit cave or tunnel, geometric crystal structure
